description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this green backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super funky! Height: 58.5 cm Width: 28 cm Depth at base: 15 cm Made of nylon for enhanced durability One large roomy main compartment with an organiser space for essentials Small zippered pocket inside the chamber for storing essentials One zippered pocket and one pocket with a flap and clasp on the front Brand name appliqué d on the flap Mesh pocket on the side to hold a bottle Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Mesh on the back and straps for better ventilation and breathability Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Brand tab appliqué d on the side Haul loop with soft handle for handling ease Rubber opening on the top of the backpack for earphones to come through Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
